text: Truly exceptional experience at Erasable Med Spa.  Emily, Anna, Jessica & Lacey wrre wonderful and engaging during my appointment.
author: Jesse Phillips

text: They made the tattoo removal process as easy and painless as possible. They are true professionals and I highly recommend coming here!
author: Katie McGhee

text: This is my go to medspa for tattoo removal. Always a great service, experience and friendly staff!
author: Joanna

text:
CAUTION READ 1ST BEFORE CONSIDERING ERASEABLE INC !!! ⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️

Read this first if you’re considering tattoo removal.

It takes a special level of precision, experience, and attention to detail to properly target tattoo ink, especially colored ink, the way Kristen and her team do. The care they put into their work is truly impressive.

The results I’ve seen are remarkable. The before and after photos speak for themselves. Proof that what they’re doing really works. Seeing those results kept me motivated throughout my own tattoo removal journey, especially knowing they are removing something that was meant to be permanent.

Erasable Inc. truly feels like a one of a kind business. I can understand why they are not franchised or spread across multiple locations, because the level of meticulous work they do would be very hard to duplicate.

I highly recommend Erasable Inc. to anyone thinking about tattoo removal. Thank you Kristen and the team. I’m looking forward to my next session!
author: Hadiya Isaacs (Hadiya)

text: Lacey was absolutely wonderful! She was knowledgeable, spent the time to educate me, and the services were painless. Coming back for more!
author: Elena Alexiev

text: Love Erasable Med Spa. Everyone is so sweet, knowledgeable and helpful. They thrive to do what's right for you. Love and highly recommend them.
author: Rebecca Loveland

text: Got laser tattoo removal with Lacey. She’s awesome!! Makes a painful experience much better to deal with. She’s super nice, personable and always in a good mood!!
author: Sandra Beronda

text:
I have nothing but good things to say about Erasable. Ease of scheduling, check in, consultations, procedures, check out; all professional and efficient. ARNP Kristen is patient and personable, and takes the time to discuss needs and expectations.

Second review 3/2/26:
Probably the most relaxing and enjoyable facial I've had, even with the "gritty" DiamondGlow dermabrasion part. Aysha took the time to listen to my concerns, explain the treatment, and recommend products. I appreciated the skincare routine advice without being pushy about selling. I look forward to my next treatment with her.
author: Cynthia Humayun
